glosses.vi: phát báo; tổ chức trận đấu
glosses.nb: dele ut aviser; arrangere en kamp
glosses.sv: dela ut tidningar; arrangera en match
glosses.ja: 新聞を配達する; 試合を開催する

sentences.target: Ich muss heute die Zeitungen austragen.

translations.de: Ich muss heute die Zeitungen austragen.
translations.en: I have to deliver the newspapers today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo que repartir los periódicos.
translations.fr: Je dois distribuer les journaux aujourd'hui.
translations.he: אני צריך לחלק את העיתונים היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải đi phát báo.
translations.hu: Ma ki kell hordanom az újságokat.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να μοιράσω τις εφημερίδες.
translations.nb: Jeg må dele ut avisene i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku harus mengantar koran.
translations.sv: Jag måste dela ut tidningarna idag.
translations.da: Jeg skal dele aviser ud i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は新聞を配達しなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present 1sg; expresses necessity and selects a bare infinitive placed at the clause end.
Temporal adverb modifying the time of the event.
Definite article, plural accusative; determiner of 'Zeitungen' as the direct object.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'austragen'.
Separable-prefix verb ('aus-' + 'tragen'), here as bare infinitive due to the modal; clause-final position; in this context ‘to deliver (newspapers)’.

sentences.target: Der Postbote will die Briefe austragen.

translations.de: Der Postbote will die Briefe austragen.
translations.en: The mailman wants to deliver the letters.
translations.es: El cartero quiere repartir las cartas.
translations.fr: Le facteur veut distribuer les lettres.
translations.it: Il postino vuole consegnare le lettere.
translations.pt: O carteiro quer entregar as cartas.
translations.vi: Người đưa thư muốn phát những lá thư.
translations.nl: De postbode wil de brieven bezorgen.
translations.hu: A postás kézbesíteni akarja a leveleket.
translations.el: Ο ταχυδρόμος θέλει να μοιράσει τα γράμματα.
translations.ja: 郵便配達員は手紙を配りたがっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present 3sg; expresses volition and selects bare infinitive 'austragen' at clause end.
Definite article, plural accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'austragen'.
Separable-prefix verb ('aus-' + 'tragen'), bare infinitive selected by the modal; clause-final position; here ‘to deliver (letters)’.

sentences.target: Wir wollen das Spiel am Samstag austragen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən das ʃpiːl am ˈzamstaːk ˈaʊ̯stʁaːɡn̩/

translations.de: Wir wollen das Spiel am Samstag austragen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən das ʃpiːl am ˈzamstaːk ˈaʊ̯stʁaːɡn̩/
translations.en: We want to hold the game on Saturday.
translations.es: Queremos jugar el partido el sábado.
translations.fr: Nous voulons jouer le match samedi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想在周六举行比赛。
translations.yue: 我哋想喺星期六舉行比賽。
translations.ru: Мы хотим провести матч в субботу.
translations.pt: Queremos fazer o jogo no sábado.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לקיים את המשחק בשבת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn tổ chức trận đấu vào thứ bảy.
translations.nl: We willen de wedstrijd zaterdag spelen.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо провести матч у суботу.
translations.hi: हम मैच शनिवार को खेलना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να γίνει ο αγώνας το Σάββατο.
translations.nb: Vi vil spille kampen på lørdag.
translations.id: Kami ingin mengadakan pertandingan pada hari Sabtu.
translations.sv: Vi vill spela matchen på lördag.
translations.da: Vi vil spille kampen på lørdag.
translations.ja: 土曜日に試合をしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present 1pl; expresses volition and selects bare infinitive at clause end.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of the direct object 'Spiel'.
Common noun, accusative neuter singular; direct object of 'austragen'.
Preposition ‘an’ fused with ‘dem’ (contraction ‘am’), forming a temporal PP; assigns dative to its complement.
Common noun (day of week), dative singular as object of the preposition ‘am’; temporal adjunct.
Separable-prefix verb ('aus-' + 'tragen'), bare infinitive selected by the modal; clause-final position; here ‘to stage/hold (a match/game)’.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarn wollen ihren Streit ruhig austragen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaχbaʁn ˈvɔlən ˈiːʁən ʃtʁaɪ̯t ˈʁuːɪç ˈaʊ̯stʁaːɡn̩/

translations.de: Die Nachbarn wollen ihren Streit ruhig austragen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaχbaʁn ˈvɔlən ˈiːʁən ʃtʁaɪ̯t ˈʁuːɪç ˈaʊ̯stʁaːɡn̩/
translations.en: The neighbors want to settle their dispute calmly.
translations.es: Los vecinos quieren resolver su disputa con calma.
translations.fr: Les voisins veulent régler leur différend calmement.
translations.it: I vicini vogliono risolvere la loro lite con calma.
translations.ko: 이웃들이 다툼을 차분하게 해결하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居们想冷静地解决他们的矛盾。
translations.yue: 鄰居想冷靜咁解決佢哋嘅爭拗。
translations.ru: Соседи хотят мирно уладить свой спор.
translations.pt: Os vizinhos querem resolver a briga com calma.
translations.he: השכנים רוצים ליישב את הסכסוך שלהם ברוגע.
translations.tr: Komşular kavgalarını sakin bir şekilde çözmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm muốn giải quyết mâu thuẫn của họ một cách bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: De buren willen hun ruzie rustig bijleggen.
translations.uk: Сусіди хочуть спокійно владнати свою суперечку.
translations.hu: A szomszédok nyugodtan szeretnék rendezni a vitájukat.
translations.hi: पड़ोसी अपनी अनबन को शांति से सुलझाना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Sąsiedzi chcą spokojnie rozwiązać swój spór.
translations.el: Οι γείτονες θέλουν να λύσουν τη διαφωνία τους ήρεμα.
translations.nb: Naboene vil løse konflikten sin på en rolig måte.
translations.id: Para tetangga ingin menyelesaikan perselisihan mereka dengan tenang.
translations.sv: Grannarna vill lösa sin konflikt lugnt.
translations.ro: Vecinii vor să-și rezolve conflictul în mod calm.
translations.cs: Sousedé chtějí svůj spor vyřešit v klidu.
translations.da: Naboerne vil løse deres konflikt i ro og mag.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちは穏やかに争いを解決したいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, nominative plural; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present 3pl; expresses volition and selects bare infinitive at clause end.
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Streit'; modifies the direct object.
Common noun, accusative masculine singular; direct object of 'austragen'.
Manner adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates how the action is carried out.
Separable-prefix verb ('aus-' + 'tragen'), bare infinitive selected by the modal; clause-final position; here ‘to settle/resolve (a dispute)’.
